libraries.title: Libraries
libraries.description: Manage your audiobook and ebook libraries

audiobookLibrary.label: Audiobook Library
audiobookLibrary.description: The folder where your audiobooks are stored

toast.updateError: Failed to update audiobook library path
toast.removeError: Failed to remove audiobook library path

ebookLibrary.label: Ebook Library
ebookLibrary.description: The folder where your ebooks are stored

toast.updateError: Failed to update ebook library path
toast.removeError: Failed to remove ebook library path

opds.label: OPDS Feed
opds.description: OPDS (Open Publication Distribution System) allows e-reader apps like KOReader, Moon+ Reader, and Calibre to browse and download ebooks directly from your library. To connect, enter any username (e.g., your email) and use your API token as the password when configuring the OPDS feed in your reader app.
opds.authHint: Use any username and your API token as the password to authenticate.

folderPicker.title: Select Library Folder
folderPicker.description: Choose the folder for your library
folderPicker.audiobookDescription: Choose the folder where your audiobooks are stored
folderPicker.ebookDescription: Choose the folder where your ebooks are stored

metadataPriority.title: Metadata Priority
metadataPriority.description: Configure the priority order for each metadata field. Higher items take precedence when data is available from multiple sources.

hardcoverLinking.title: Hardcover Linking
hardcoverLinking.description: Queue unlinked items for automatic Hardcover metadata matching

toast.notConfigured: Hardcover is not configured. Please set up your API key in Integrations.

rescan.title: Rescan Metadata
rescan.description: Re-extract metadata from all audiobook files and update database records
rescan.hint: This will re-read metadata from your audio files. Manually edited fields will not be overwritten. File information (duration, bitrate, etc.) is always updated.

createDialog.title: Create User
createDialog.description: Add a new user to the system
createDialog.name: Name
createDialog.passwordHint: User will use this to log in initially

banDialog.title: Ban User
banDialog.description: This will prevent the user from logging in

deleteDialog.title: Delete User
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Configure how users can access your audiobook vault

signups.label: Allow Sign-ups
signups.description: When disabled, only existing users can sign in

emailPassword.label: Email/Password Login
emailPassword.description: Allow users to sign in with email and password

oidc.title: Single Sign-On (OIDC)
oidc.notConfiguredHint: OIDC is not configured. Set OIDC_ENABLED=true and configure OIDC_ISSUER_URL, OIDC_CLIENT_ID, and OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET environment variables to enable SSO.

buttonText.label: SSO Button Text
buttonText.description: The text displayed on the SSO sign-in button

autoCreate.label: Auto-create OIDC Users
autoCreate.description: Control how new users are created when signing in via OIDC for the first time

defaultPermissions.title: Default New User Permissions
defaultPermissions.description: When new users sign up or authenticate via SSO, they will receive these permissions by default
defaultPermissions.canEditMetadataDescription: Allow new users to edit audiobook and ebook metadata
defaultPermissions.canUploadDescription: Allow new users to upload audiobooks and ebooks
defaultPermissions.canDeleteDescription: Allow new users to delete audiobooks and ebooks
defaultPermissions.canGenerateApiKeysDescription: Allow new users to generate API keys for programmatic access
defaultPermissions.canRequestContentDescription: Allow new users to request new content from external sources

error.loadFailed: Failed to load settings. Please try again.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect external services for metadata and enrichment

requests.title: Content Requests
requests.description: Allow users to search and request content from external sources

toggle.label: Enable Content Requests
toggle.description: Allow users to search and request new content from external sources
toggle.disabledTooltip: Requires MAM_CLIENT_URL and MAM_CLIENT_API_KEY environment variables to be configured

warning.title: Configuration Required
warning.description: Content requests require MAM_CLIENT_URL and MAM_CLIENT_API_KEY environment variables to be configured. Please set these in your environment to enable this feature.

toast.error: Failed to update content requests setting

categories.title: qBittorrent Categories
categories.description: Configure the category names used in qBittorrent when downloading requested content. These should match categories configured in your qBittorrent client.

requests.autoApproveLimitDescription: Number of requests each user can auto-approve per week. Set to 0 to disable.

freeleech.label: Use Freeleech Wedges
freeleech.description: Automatically spend a personal freeleech wedge on each torrent before downloading. If no wedges are available, the download will fail.

hardcover.title: Hardcover
hardcover.description: Connect to Hardcover to fetch book metadata, ratings, and cover art

autoSync.label: Auto-sync on import
autoSync.description: Automatically fetch metadata from Hardcover when new audiobooks are imported
autoSync.warning: Recommended to enable only after your initial library import is complete. Auto-linking errors during large imports can be difficult to track.

goodreads.title: Goodreads Finder
goodreads.description: Search Goodreads for book metadata and series information

status.activeDescription: Goodreads Finder is configured and ready to use. You can search for book metadata and series information.
status.inactiveDescription: Set the GR_FINDER_URL environment variable to enable this integration.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.description: Create and manage announcements shown to all users on the home page
announcements.noAnnouncementsDescription: Create an announcement to display a message to all users on the home page.

createDialog.title: Create Announcement
createDialog.description: Create a new announcement to display on the home page
createDialog.iconUrlHint: Leave empty for default icon, or enter a URL for a custom icon

deleteDialog.title: Delete Announcement
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this announcement? This action cannot be undone.

genres.title: Genres
genres.description: Manage genres used across audiobooks and ebooks
genres.empty: No genres found. Genres are created automatically when importing audiobooks and ebooks.

delete.title: Delete Genre?
delete.note: The audiobooks and ebooks will remain, only the genre association will be removed.

restore.title: Restore from AudioBookShelf
restore.description: Import your library and data from an AudioBookShelf backup

wizard.title: Restore from AudioBookShelf
wizard.description: Follow the steps below to import your AudioBookShelf library

upload.title: Upload Backup
upload.description: Upload your AudioBookShelf backup file to begin the restore process

prerequisites.title: Before You Begin
prerequisites.description: Please ensure you have completed the following steps before starting the restore process.

backup.title: Create an AudioBookShelf backup
backup.description: In AudioBookShelf, go to Settings → Backups and create a new backup. Download the .audiobookshelf backup file to your computer.

files.title: Ensure your audiobook files are accessible
files.description: Your audiobook files must be accessible from this server at the same paths (or you'll need to map the paths during import). Bookmark reads audio files directly from disk.

users.title: Create user accounts in Bookmark
users.description: If you want to import listening progress, the users must already exist in Bookmark. Create any needed user accounts before starting the restore.

diskSpace.title: Ensure sufficient disk space
diskSpace.description: The backup file will be temporarily extracted. Ensure you have enough disk space for the backup file plus extraction (roughly 2x the backup size).

checklist.title: Quick Checklist
checklist.item1: I have created and downloaded an AudioBookShelf .audiobookshelf backup file
checklist.item2: My audiobook files are accessible from this server
checklist.item3: I have created user accounts for progress import (if needed)

upload.dropzoneTitle: Drop your backup file here or click to browse
upload.dropzoneDescription: Select an .audiobookshelf backup file from AudioBookShelf
upload.infoPoint1: This wizard will guide you through restoring your AudioBookShelf data
upload.infoPoint2: The backup file must be an .audiobookshelf export from AudioBookShelf
upload.infoPoint3: Existing audiobooks can be preserved or overwritten

errors.invalidFileType: Please select a valid .audiobookshelf backup file
errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {maxSize}

library.title: Select Library
library.description: Choose which AudioBookShelf library to restore
library.infoPoint1: Select the AudioBookShelf library you want to import
library.infoPoint2: Only one library can be imported at a time
library.infoPoint3: All folders within the selected library will be imported

errors.noSession: No session found. Please upload a backup file first.
errors.noLibrariesDescription: The uploaded backup file does not contain any libraries. Please upload a valid AudioBookShelf backup.

paths.title: Configure Paths
paths.description: Map the AudioBookShelf library path to your Bookmark path
paths.absPathDescription: This is where your audiobooks were stored in AudioBookShelf
paths.savPathDescription: Enter where your audiobooks are currently stored on this system
paths.infoPoint1: The AudioBookShelf path will be replaced with the Bookmark path in all database records
paths.infoPoint2: Make sure your audiobooks are accessible at the new path
paths.infoPoint3: File and folder structure should be the same as in AudioBookShelf

errors.noSession: No session found. Please upload a backup file first.
errors.noLibrarySelectedDescription: Please go back and select a library to restore.

users.title: Map Users
users.description: Map AudioBookShelf users to Bookmark users to import listening progress
users.skipWarning: Progress for this user will not be imported
users.unmappedWarning: Some users with progress are not mapped. Their listening progress will not be imported.
users.noUsersFound: No users found in backup with listening progress

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load session or users

options.title: Import Options
options.description: Choose what data to import from your AudioBookShelf backup

importProgress.label: Import listening progress
importProgress.description: Import user playback positions and completion status for mapped users. This includes current position, finished books, and bookmarks.

importCovers.label: Import audiobook covers
importCovers.description: Copy cover images from the AudioBookShelf backup to your Bookmark library. Covers will be stored in the app data folder.

importAuthorImages.label: Import author images
importAuthorImages.description: Copy author and narrator profile images from the AudioBookShelf backup. These will be stored in the app data folder.

lockMetadata.label: Lock imported metadata
lockMetadata.description: Treat imported metadata as manual edits, giving it the highest priority. This prevents Hardcover from overriding your imported data. Recommended if your AudioBookShelf metadata is well-curated.

overwriteExisting.label: Overwrite existing audiobooks
overwriteExisting.description: Replace metadata for audiobooks that already exist in your library (matched by file path). This will overwrite titles, descriptions, covers, and other metadata.

options.overwriteWarning: Existing audiobook metadata and covers will be replaced with data from the AudioBookShelf backup. This action cannot be undone. Make sure you have a backup of your current data if needed.

preview.title: Import Preview
preview.description: Review what will be imported from your AudioBookShelf backup

willBeImported.title: What Will Be Imported
willBeImported.description: The following data will be imported from your AudioBookShelf backup.

willNotBeImported.title: What Will NOT Be Imported
willNotBeImported.description: The following data from AudioBookShelf is not supported or not included in the import.

importNotes.title: Important Notes
importNotes.overwriteEnabled: Existing audiobooks will be OVERWRITTEN with data from the backup.
importNotes.overwriteDisabled: Existing audiobooks will be SKIPPED (not overwritten).
importNotes.audiobooksSkipped: {count} audiobook(s) will be skipped because audio files were not found at the expected paths.
importNotes.usersSkipped: Progress for {count} unmapped user(s) will not be imported.

audiobooks.label: Audiobooks
audiobooks.description: Audiobook metadata (title, author, description, duration, etc.)

progress.label: Listening Progress
progress.description: Playback positions, finished status, and bookmarks for mapped users

authorImages.label: Author/Narrator Images
authorImages.description: Profile images for authors and narrators

userAccounts.label: User accounts
userAccounts.reason: Users must already exist in Bookmark. Only progress data is imported for mapped users.

audioFiles.label: Audio files
audioFiles.reason: Audio files are not stored in the backup. Bookmark reads files directly from your configured library path.

playlists.label: Playlists and collections
playlists.reason: AudioBookShelf playlists are not supported in Bookmark.

customFields.label: Custom metadata fields
customFields.reason: AudioBookShelf custom fields are not imported.

librarySettings.label: Library settings
librarySettings.reason: Library configuration must be set up separately in Bookmark.

sampleAudiobooks.title: Sample Audiobooks
sampleAudiobooks.description: Review a sample of audiobooks that will be imported or skipped.

import.title: Importing Data
import.description: Please do not close this page. The import is in progress.
import.descriptionComplete: Your AudioBookShelf data has been successfully imported!
import.descriptionFailed: The import failed and all changes have been rolled back.
import.completedDescription: Your AudioBookShelf data has been successfully imported. Redirecting to your library...
import.rolledBackDescription: The import was cancelled or failed, and all changes have been rolled back. No data was modified.
